label: Sanctum of the Severed Star
description: The Sanctum of the Severed Star serves as a fortified chapel within Cyrenth Bastion-City, its plan set in thick ferrocrete bays sheathed in void-black adamantine to match the city’s siege architecture. A ribbed nave runs beneath armored ribs and shuttered clerestories, where bruise-hued auroral light filters through sanctified glass scored with wards against empyrean taint. Recessed altars and reliquary niches occupy blast-rated side chapels, while airlocks and decontamination grates are built into the threshold in strict accordance with quarantine protocol. Vox-baffles and hymn resonators line the walls, enforcing a disciplined acoustics suited to rites conducted under isolation and alarm.
